# Obligatory Mermaid Architecture Documentation

## When to use

- Creating architecture documentation
- Updating architecture-relevant code paths

## Minimum required diagrams

1. High-level system context diagram
2. Component/module interaction diagram
3. Runtime flow diagram for key user/service paths

## Diagram quality standards

- Keep nodes aligned to real package/module/service names
- Update diagrams whenever architecture-relevant code changes
- Preferred Mermaid types:
  - `flowchart`
  - `sequenceDiagram`
  - `classDiagram`
  - `graph TD` / `graph LR`
